name: setup-ddev-basic
prompt: Set up DDEV for this TYPO3 extension so I can develop locally

assertions.description: Runs bash commands to validate prerequisites or configure DDEV

name: multi-version-testing
prompt: Configure multi-version TYPO3 testing with DDEV for versions 12 and 13

name: prerequisites-check
prompt: What do I need installed before using DDEV for TYPO3?

name: database-selection
prompt: My TYPO3 extension has custom database tables in ext_tables.sql. Which database should DDEV use?

assertions.description: Recommends MariaDB for extensions with custom tables

name: database-sqlite-simple
prompt: I have a simple TYPO3 frontend plugin with no custom SQL. What database should I use in DDEV?

assertions.description: Clarifies SQLite is for development only

name: php-version-management
prompt: DDEV has PHP 8.5.0RC3 but I need the latest stable PHP 8.5. How do I upgrade?

assertions.description: References web-build Dockerfile for PHP upgrades

name: windows-health-check
prompt: ddev start hangs at 'Waiting for containers to become ready' on Windows. How do I fix it?

assertions.description: Identifies PHP-FPM status endpoint as the fix

name: windows-line-endings
prompt: I get 'Command contains CRLF' error in DDEV on Windows. How to fix?

assertions.description: Mentions converting to LF line endings

name: docs-rendering
prompt: How do I render my TYPO3 extension documentation locally with DDEV?

name: valkey-redis-setup
prompt: I need caching for my TYPO3 extension in DDEV. Should I use Redis or Valkey?

assertions.description: Explains Valkey is wire-compatible with Redis

name: post-setup-verification
prompt: How do I verify my DDEV TYPO3 setup is working correctly?

name: typo3-12-vs-13-cli
prompt: What are the differences between TYPO3 12 and 13 setup commands in DDEV?

name: container-priority
prompt: Should I run PHP commands directly on my system or through DDEV for this TYPO3 project?

assertions.description: Recommends using ddev exec for commands

name: port-conflict
prompt: DDEV fails to start because port 80 is already in use. What should I do?

name: xdebug-setup
prompt: How do I enable XDebug for debugging my TYPO3 extension in DDEV?

assertions.description: References the ddev xdebug on command

name: pcov-installation
prompt: How do I install PCOV for code coverage in my DDEV TYPO3 project?

assertions.description: Warns that pecl is not available in DDEV

name: extension-naming
prompt: My extension key is nr_llm but I need to reference it in composer and documentation. What names should I use?

assertions.description: Explains hyphenated naming for composer packages

name: cache-flush
prompt: How do I clear the TYPO3 cache in my DDEV environment?

assertions.description: References the cache:flush TYPO3 CLI command
Uses ddev exec to run commands inside container

name: landing-page-branding
prompt: Generate a landing page for my Netresearch TYPO3 extension DDEV project

name: ofelia-scheduler
prompt: How do I automate TYPO3 scheduler tasks in my DDEV environment?

assertions.description: Uses the correct Netresearch Ofelia image

name: credentials
prompt: What are the default admin credentials for the TYPO3 backend in DDEV?

name: access-urls
prompt: How do I access the TYPO3 v13 backend in my DDEV environment?

name: php-custom-ini
prompt: Where do I put custom PHP settings like memory_limit in my DDEV project?

name: makefile-generation
prompt: How can I generate a Makefile for common tasks in my DDEV TYPO3 project?

name: full-cleanup
prompt: How do I completely remove my DDEV TYPO3 environment and start fresh?
